issues.description:
## Input
Parent App Request: [DEV-25](mention://issue/f01f5264-86df-4f80-a2ff-f6a1abbb0794).
PRD sub-issue (must land first): [DEV-26](mention://issue/799e091f-184e-4551-8f8d-fd55cf62c59f).

Two surfaces:
- **Employee Android app** (React Native + Expo) — primary, mobile-only, RTL-first.
- **HR Admin web dashboard** (Next.js) — desktop primary, tablet supported.

## Expected Output
UX Architect (lead) coordinates UI Designer + Arabic RTL Experience Agent to produce:

1. **Sitemap** for both surfaces — every reachable screen.
2. **Screen list** (`dashboard-screen-planner`) per-screen spec: purpose, key components, primary CTA, secondary actions, data shown, permission gate, empty/loading/error variants. Must apply:
   - `wcag-accessibility-checklist` (WCAG 2.2 AA)
   - `i18n-multilang-setup`
   - `rtl-arabic-ui-planner` (RTL mirroring, Arabic-KW copy, locale-aware date/number)
3. **Mobile screens** (Android, RTL-first):
   - Login (employee ID or magic link), Today (status card, big check-in/out button), Check-in flow (geofence check → selfie → QR option → confirmation), History (30 days), Shift (this week + next), Leave (submit + status), Settings, Offline indicator + queue view.
4. **Admin web screens** (LTR + RTL):
   - Login (MFA optional), Dashboard (live attendance board), Employees (CRUD + photo + civil ID + department + manager + shift), Offices (CRUD + geofence map), Shifts (CRUD + grace + break), Live Attendance, Reports (daily/weekly/monthly, CSV + PDF), Leave Management (approve/reject), Audit Log, Settings (roles, feature flags, tenant config).
5. **Arabic-KW copy plan** (`arabic-rtl-experience-agent`) — every screen's primary labels in Arabic-KW + English. Native, not machine-translated.
6. **Mobile layout** described for any screen at ≤375px.
7. **Role visibility** matrix per screen (Super Admin · HR Manager · Dept Manager · Employee).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Every screen has empty/loading/error variants
- [ ] Every Arabic-bound screen has RTL variant noted
- [ ] Mobile layout described at 375px for every mobile screen
- [ ] Role visibility called out per screen
- [ ] Arabic-KW copy is native (reviewed by `arabic-rtl-experience-agent`), not translated
- [ ] Per-screen permission gate matches role matrix from DEV-26

## Dependencies
DEV-26 (PRD + role matrix + user stories). Will be promoted to `todo` by Sprint Commander once DEV-26 lands.

## Risk
- Selfie capture on Android has device-specific camera quirks — note in UX states (camera permission denied, low light, blurred).
- Offline queue view UX — must show pending punches clearly to avoid duplicate taps.

## Definition of Done
Sitemap + screen list + Arabic copy plan + mobile layouts posted as artifacts on this issue. Hand off to Build Squad via comment on parent (DEV-25). Move this issue to `in_review`.

## Routing
Owner: Product UX Squad (ux-architect lead).
issues.title: UX Pack — Sitemap, Screen List, RTL/Arabic Plan — Android Attendance App

issues.description:
## Input
Parent App Request: [DEV-25](mention://issue/f01f5264-86df-4f80-a2ff-f6a1abbb0794).
PRD sub-issue (must land first): [DEV-26](mention://issue/799e091f-184e-4551-8f8d-fd55cf62c59f).

Default stack confirmed per parent: **React Native (Expo) Android** + **Next.js HR admin** + **Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Storage + Realtime + Edge Functions)** + **FCM** for push + **Vercel** for web + **EAS Build** for APK/AAB. Do NOT deviate without CEO approval.

## Expected Output
Solution Architect (lead) coordinates Database Architect + API Architect + Integration Architect to produce the full Architecture pack:

1. **ADR-001** — stack choice, rejected alternatives + reasons, cost note at 100/1k/10k users.
2. **Database schema** (`database-schema-designer`) — Postgres DDL with RLS on every user-scoped table. Must apply:
   - `multi-tenant-architecture` (workspace_id on every table)
   - `audit-log-designer` (every check-in/out + admin edit logged with actor, ip, device)
   - Core tables: tenants, users, employees, departments, offices (with geofence radius), shifts, shift_assignments, punches (check-in/out with location, selfie_url, qr_code, status, offline_synced_at), leave_requests, audit_log, push_tokens, feature_flags, public_holidays.
3. **OpenAPI 3.1 contract** (`api-contract-designer`) — every endpoint, error model, pagination, versioning. Must apply:
   - `api-versioning-strategy` (e.g. `/v1`)
   - `rate-limiting-design` (punch endpoint: 1 per 30s per employee)
4. **Auth model** wired to the role matrix from DEV-26 — Supabase Auth, JWT, RLS policies, refresh strategy, RBAC for 4 roles.
5. **Integrations brief** (`integration-architect`) — FCM (push), Supabase Storage (selfies), optional MyFatoorah (Phase 2 payroll), email fallback (Resend or Supabase SMTP), Sentry, PostHog. Each: purpose, auth, rate limits, failure mode, idempotency, retry policy.
6. **Security model** — secret storage, PII inventory (civil ID, biometric, location), retention, audit log requirement, threat model summary, PDPL-Kuwait classification.
7. **Env vars list** for local/preview/staging/prod.
8. **List of external scaffolds required** — to be escalated to admin@newtechkw.com:
   - Supabase project (free tier OK for MVP)
   - GitHub repo
   - Vercel project
   - Firebase project (FCM)
   - Expo / EAS account

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ADR-001 names rejected alternatives
- [ ] Every user-scoped table has RLS policy in DDL
- [ ] Every API endpoint has an error model
- [ ] Every integration has documented failure mode
- [ ] Secrets management defined; no secret ever in client bundle
- [ ] Punch endpoint rate-limit is concrete (e.g. token bucket, 1/30s)
- [ ] Audit log covers every destructive action
- [ ] Env vars list complete per environment
- [ ] Credentials escalation comment drafted (not yet sent — wait for CEO trigger)

## Dependencies
DEV-26 (PRD + role matrix). Will be promoted to `todo` by Sprint Commander once DEV-26 lands.

## Risk
- Anti-buddy-punch with selfie-only is weak; document the limitation in the security model and flag face-recognition as Phase 2.
- GPS spoofing — geofence + WiFi SSID fingerprint as MVP defense, BLE beacons Phase 2.
- Battery drain — foreground-only location requests at punch time, no background tracking.

## Definition of Done
ADR + schema + OpenAPI + auth model + integrations brief + security model + env list posted as artifacts on this issue. Comment on parent (DEV-25) with handoff summary + credentials list. Then create Build sub-issues in `05 - Parallel Build` via `user-stories-to-issues` (status `backlog`; CEO promotes when credentials land). Move this issue to `in_review`.

## Routing
Owner: Architecture Squad (solution-architect lead).
issues.title: Architecture Pack — Android Attendance App (stack, schema, API, integrations)
